CreateStoreModal.title: Create Store
CreateStoreModal.description: Create a new store to start selling your products.

Footer.buy_sell_follow: Buy, Sell, and Follow your Favorites Products
Footer.subscribe_desc: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates and exclusive offers.

About.title: About Us
About.description: We build modern, customer-centric E-commerce experiences powered by technology, transparency, and trust.
About.p1: {siteName} was founded in 2025 with the desire to create an online marketplace, where could buy and sell goods, offer services and so on. Our mission is to be most trusted and comprehensive online platform, helping accelerate the country’s transformation to a modern digital society. We connect people with the goods, services, and opportunities they need to enhance their everyday lives. By offering a safe, efficient, transparent, and accessible marketplace
About.p2: Our team of expert developers, designers, and strategists work tirelessly to create custom solutions that help our clients streamline their operations, increase efficiency, and drive growth.
About.p3: At {siteName}, we believe in the power of technology to transform businesses and improve lives. We are committed to staying at the forefront of technological advancements and delivering exceptional value to our clients.

ContactUs.title: Contact Us
ContactUs.description:
If you have any comments or feedback, please do not hesitate to write us. We love feedback! This is your site and your suggestions will help us make it better.
Please provide as much detail as possible. If your inquiry is related to an existing ad, please include the ad reference number with your message. Our support team is here to help with any questions or feedback.
ContactUs.name: Name

Faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faqs.description: Find answers to the most common questions from our customers.
Faqs.q3_title: What payment methods do you accept?

AccountSettings.register_stripe_desc: To start selling products and accepting payments and manage your sales, you need a Stripe seller account. Click the button below to quickly register or log in. After completing it, you can:
AccountSettings.payouts_desc: Receive payouts to your bank account
AccountSettings.login_stripe_desc:
Already have a Stripe seller account?
Click the button below to securely log in to your Stripe Dashboard and manage your sales, products, and payouts.
Access your account anytime to track orders and payments.

Dashboard.Upgrade plan: Upgrade your plan to unlock Premium features
